fact_nuggets.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Bag item 1.1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.2 Generation IX 1.2 Held item Effect [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ] If used from the Bag , it changes the Ability slot of a Pokemon from one of its standard Abilities to its Hidden Ability . As a result, if the Pokemon evolves and has a different Hidden Ability than its Evolution, its Evolution will have the Hidden Ability. A Pokemon that has its Hidden Ability due to the Ability Patch can also pass down its Hidden Ability via breeding . The Ability Patch can only be used on a Pokemon that belongs to a species with a Hidden Ability. For example, it can be used to change a Rookidee 's Ability from Keen Eye or Unnerve to Big Pecks , but it cannot be used to change a Metapod 's Ability (which is always Shed Skin ). Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] The Ability Patch cannot be used to change a Pokemon's Ability from its Hidden Ability to one of its standard Abilities. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] The Ability Patch can now remove a Hidden Ability, setting the Ability to the Pokemon's first Ability slot. Held item [ edit | edit source ] Fling fails if the user is holding an Ability Patch.
Changes a regular Ability to a rarer one
Works only on species with Hidden Abilities

crossword_candidates.text: Only for species with hidden traits
